title: Persistent Communication

posts.author: Chae_Gardner (Chae Gardner)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to maintain persistent information across projects? I understand there can be updates and text fields, but I’m needing a messaging area that persists beyond one off projects. Preferably that combines all communications from my client into one spot. Any help would be great.

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Chae_Gardner ,

Monday.com just announced a new feature they are planning to release that is essentially an “updates” section for an entire board. Maybe once this is released that could help your use case.
Here is the link to the features roll up where this is discussed, it is near the bottom in the “In Development” section
New features wrap-up (June)!
